source_changes: Forward migration 0074 creates durable gateway request, reservation, shared rate, settlement adjustment, reconciliation, lineage, and proof-projection state plus atomic RPCs.
Model gateway removes process-local admission and uses stable request identity, DB admission, provider idempotency headers, ambiguous-on-post-dispatch-loss, and settlement/release/refund transitions.
Accepted provider usage is bound to a canonical accepted effect receipt and matching commercial receipt.
Artifact publish result and owner proof projection bind exact revision, approval, effect receipt, and verification; repair resumes projection without re-executing accepted effects.
Deterministic fault hooks exist only in test dependencies and cannot be enabled by caller input.
hard_invariants: one approval authorizes one exact immutable revision
retries never duplicate an irreversible effect
budget reservation, commit, release, and refund conserve value
distributed rate authority cannot be bypassed per worker or process
accepted-but-unrecorded outcomes become ambiguous and reconcile before retry
success is impossible without an accepted durable receipt
output, receipt, proof, and accounting identify the same revision and effect
every partial state has a convergent resume or repair path
cross-account, cross-assignment, stale-authority, and stale-entitlement fail closed
repair never erases accepted prior effects or invents completion
